stories.title: How Does Trump’s Iran Deal Compare To Obama’s? Here’s What We Know.
stories.summary:
How Does Trump’s Iran Deal Compare To Obama’s? Here’s What We Know..

When Donald Trump launched his first presidential campaign, he pledged to withdraw the United States from the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action, President Barack Obama’s nuclear agreement with Iran. Trump issued a statement condemning the JCPOA as “very dangerous” shortly after it was finalized on July 14, 2015.

The president never dropped his opposition, pulling out ... Al Jazeera: Trump accuses Obama of ‘bribing’ Iran in 2015 nuclear deal at G7 summit.

Al Jazeera reports that uS President Donald Trump has accused his predecessor Barack Obama of ‘bribing’ Iran to agree to the 2015 nuclear deal.

stories.title: Comedian Nate Bargatze draws fan backlash after attending Trump's White House UFC event
stories.summary:
Comedian Nate Bargatze draws fan backlash after attending Trump's White House UFC event. Comedian Nate Bargatze is facing a wave of criticism from fans after he was spotted at the UFC Freedom 250 event held on the South Lawn of the White House on Sunday, which coincided with President Trump's 80th birthday and drew more than 4,000 attendees.

A rep for Bargatze said that the comedian "is not political nor is anything he produces" and described him as a "huge UFC fan" who has followed the sport "since before it became political.". Breitbart: Comedian Nate Bargatze Faces Fan Backlash After Attending Trump's UFC White House Event.

Breitbart reports that comedian Nate Bargatze is facing backlash from fans after attending President Donald Trump's White House UFC event on Sunday. "I'm heartbroken that I can't be a fan anymore," one person bemoaned.

stories.title: Backlash Mounts Against MLB For Targeting Christians: ‘You’ll Be Hearing From My Office’
stories.summary:
Backlash Mounts Against MLB For Targeting Christians: ‘You’ll Be Hearing From My Office’. Backlash against Major League Baseball is continuing to build after the league condemned and warned Christian baseball players for counter-signaling or outright rejecting an LGBT “Pride Night” last week.

As highlighted by The Daily Wire, several San Francisco Giants players marked their gay pride-themed baseball caps with Bible passages, while another player refused to wear ... Washington Times: MLB 'must answer' for warning after Giants pitchers' Pride Night message: Sen. Hawley.

Washington Times reports that sen. Josh Hawley sent a letter to MLB Commissioner Rob Manfred on Tuesday demanding answers after the league issued a warning to three San Francisco Giants pitchers who wrote a Bible passage on their caps for the team's LGBTQ Pride night on Friday.

stories.title: Warsh-led Fed holds rates steady, as inflation rules out easing sought by Trump
stories.summary:
Warsh-led Fed holds rates steady, as inflation rules out easing sought by Trump. The Federal Reserve voted Wednesday to hold its interest rate target steady following the first meeting for new Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh, meaning that President Donald Trump’s long-expressed desire for the central bank to lower interest rates will be unfulfilled for now.

After a two-day meeting in Washington, the Fed’s monetary policy committee announced it […]. New York Post: Fed holds interest rates steady in Kevin Warsh’s first meeting as chair.

New York Post reports that the Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at Kevin Warsh’s first meeting as chairman Wednesday in a unanimous vote.

stories.title: White House Denies 'Leaked' Text of Iran Deal: 'Does Not Reflect' Agreement
stories.summary:
White House Denies 'Leaked' Text of Iran Deal: 'Does Not Reflect' Agreement. White House Communications Director Steven Cheung denied that a text circulating in multiple mainstream media outlets late on Tuesday was an accurate text of the ultimate draft of a memorandum of understanding between Iran and America to end the current war and pave the wave for nuclear negotiations.

The post White House Denies ‘Leaked’ Text. Daily Wire: Read Exactly What The White House Says Is In The Deal With Iran.

Daily Wire reports that wASHINGTON— The text of the agreement between the United States and Iran has finally been shared with reporters.

After days of intense scrutiny and debate over the deal, a senior Trump administration official read the “memorandum of understanding between the United States of America and the Islamic Republic of Iran” to reporters on a Wednesday afternoon ...

stories.title: Legal aid worker caught in bed with fugitive teen killer pleads guilty
stories.summary: Legal aid worker caught in bed with fugitive teen killer pleads guilty. stories.title: Two Stanford grads raise $11M to build a noninvasive wearable for hormone tracking
stories.summary: Two Stanford grads raise $11M to build a noninvasive wearable for hormone tracking. Clair Health will track inflammation and bloating markers, energy levels, and cycle phase classification to give insights into cycle irregularities and perimenopause, as well as hormonal fluctuations, and how to navigate those changes.

stories.title: UFC 6 review: a bloody, brilliant MMA fighting game
stories.summary:
UFC 6 review: a bloody, brilliant MMA fighting game. PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S; EA Vancouver/Electronic Arts Micromanaging your fighter is a little tedious, but the action is thrilling in this authentically detailed sporting simulation Becoming a professional fighter takes years of repetition, drilling techniques and training footwork until everything is instinctual.

Your body needs an automatic answer for every limb, from every angle. In MMA, which encompasses every martial art, it’s even harder.

EA Sports’.

stories.title: Gatchalian thanks Villanueva, Escudero over their ‘statesmanship’
stories.summary:
Gatchalian thanks Villanueva, Escudero over their ‘statesmanship’. MANILA, Philippines — Newly elected Senate President Sherwin “Win” Gatchalian on Wednesday recognized the statesmanship shown by senators previously aligned with the current minority bloc, particularly Senators Joel Villanueva and Francis “Chiz” Escudero, for showing up during the special session.

Gatchalian sent his praise as the Senate had been in an impasse for weeks, as. Rappler: Gatchalian is new Senate President | The wRap.

Rappler reports that today’s headlines: Win Gatchalian, Chiz Escudero, Robin Padilla.

stories.title: CA confirms 5 generals after half-month delay
stories.summary:
CA confirms 5 generals after half-month delay. MANILA, Philippines – The Committee on Appointments (CA) confirmed on Wednesday the promotion of five generals from the Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP).

This comes over two weeks after the confirmation of the five senior military officers was put on hold on June 1 due to the lack of senators elected to the CA.

Rappler: Generals caught in Senate ‘war’ finally get long-awaited promotion. Rappler reports that after weeks of delays brought about by the paralysis in the Senate, five senior officers of the Armed Forces of the Philippines were finally confirmed to their new posts.

links.headline: CA confirms 5 generals after half-month delay
links.excerpt: MANILA, Philippines – The Committee on Appointments (CA) confirmed on Wednesday the promotion of five generals from the Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP). stories.title: WATCH: Congress holds special session (part 2) | July 17, 2026
stories.summary:
WATCH: Congress holds special session (part 2) | July 17, 2026. MANILA, Philippines – Lawmakers resume session as they tackle key national issues that demand urgent legislative action outside the regular calendar.

Congress convened in special session on Wednesday morning following President Ferdinand Marcos Jr.’s call for lawmakers to tackle priority legislation, including the proposd Assistance to Individuals in Crisis Situations (AICS) and the anti-political dynasty.

stories.title: PCSO: No jackpot winners in June 17 lotto draws
stories.summary:
PCSO: No jackpot winners in June 17 lotto draws. MANILA, Philippines—No bettor won the jackpot prizes in the Grand Lotto 6/55 and MegaLotto 6/45 draws conducted Wednesday, June 17, according to the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO).

Grand Lotto 6/55 produced the winning combination 55-31-46-37-48-01 for a jackpot worth ₱45 million.

No ticket matched all six numbers. MegaLotto 6/45 yielded the winning combination 34-35-09-10-19-32.

links.headline: PCSO: No jackpot winners in June 17 lotto draws
links.excerpt: MANILA, Philippines—No bettor won the jackpot prizes in the Grand Lotto 6/55 and MegaLotto 6/45 draws conducted Wednesday, June 17, according to the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO). Grand Lotto 6/55 produced the winning combination 55-31-46-37-48-01 for a jackpot worth ₱45 million. No ticket matched all six numbers. MegaLotto 6/45 yielded the winning combination 34-35-09-10-19-32

stories.title: DepEd ensures ARAL funds go directly to teachers serving as tutors
stories.summary:
DepEd ensures ARAL funds go directly to teachers serving as tutors. MANILA, Philippines —The Department of Education (DepEd) is taking steps to ensure that funds from the Academic Recovery and Accessible Learning (ARAL) Program will directly reach teachers and educators serving as tutors nationwide.

According to a DepEd statement issued on Wednesday, Education Secretary Sonny Angara stressed that the ARAL Program shows his department’s firm commitment.
